description: The Kozakura-ikka is a yakuza organization based in Kagoshima, Kyushu, Japan, with an estimated 40 active members. It was formed in 1948 by Seizo Osato. The group is noted for its unique policy, the 'Kozakura Monroe Doctrine', of not operating outside Kagoshima Prefecture and not allowing other yakuza syndicates to enter. Its criminal activities include protection racketeering, drug trafficking, and unlawful involvement in public works.
